snippet.title: [LIVE] Zara Larsson Live In Concert
snippet.description:
"Poster Girl" available: https://ZaraLarsson.lnk.to/PosterGirl

Thank you @IKEA ​for collaborating on this with me! 
Read more about the FiftyFifty game https://bit.ly/3cfFo1Z
Make a donation https://Help.unicef.org   

This International Women’s Day, I will celebrate female empowerment with a live online concert.

The COVID-19 pandemic has amplified existing gender inequalities, with women still doing three times more unpaid work in the home than men. An IKEA study found that 1/3 of women say their careers have been held back because they do more in the home than men. Which is why IKEA worked with a relationship expert to launch a game on Instagram Stories that can help start a global conversation about equality at home. This game helps couples (or flatmates) talk about and address any imbalance in the home. We must educate each other, and we must educate women all over the world!

Learn more about the FiftyFifty game here https://www.ikea.com/gb/en/campaigns/fiftyfifty-the-card-game-for-everyday-equality-pub7b826150

Don’t forget to join the live Premium-exclusive afterparty, straight after the show.
It’s only available for YouTube Premium users, so make sure you sign up now!
New members can get a free trial: youtube.com/premium​
Afterparty: https://youtu.be/d2gd4CGh0Uc​

Follow Zara Larsson:
https://www.instagram.com/zaralarsson/
https://www.facebook.com/ZaraLarssonOfficial
https://twitter.com/zaralarsson
http://www.zaralarsson.se/
http://www.zaralarssonofficial.com/

snippet.title: Schnelleres Internet auf deiner PlayStation - So geht's
snippet.description:
Online-Games, Updates, Streaming - die Internet-Leitung der Konsole muss ganz schön was mitmachen. Wie ihr das Maximum rausholen könnt verraten unsere Insider Tuning Tipps. Schnelleres Internet auf deiner PlayStation - So geht's.

00:00 Insider-Intro
00:54 Gute Verbindungen
02:03 LAN oder WLAN
03:08 Ordnung ist der halbe Speed
04:14 Doping für den Download
05:25 Allein online
06:03 Insider-Outro

DNS-Server Alternativen und noch mehr Tipps gibt's hier: https://blog.de.playstation.com/2019/10/18/schneller-spiele-herunterladen-und-strungsfrei-streamen-auf-der-playstation-4/

Wenn ihr keines unserer Videos mehr verpassen wollt, einfach hier mit einem Klick abonnieren: http://www.youtube.com/c/InsidePlayStation?sub_confirmation=1

Bei uns hört der PlayStation-Content aber noch nicht auf! Es gibt viel zu erleben, also guckt doch auch mal auf den anderen Kanälen vorbei.

Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/c/PlayStationDeutschland
Blog: https://blog.de.playstation.com/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PlayStationDE
Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/PlayStationDE
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/PlayStationDE

snippet.title: Incredible moment penguin escapes a pod of killer whales by leaping into a dinghy full of tourists
snippet.description:
This is the incredible moment a penguin escaped a pod of hungry killer whales by LEAPING into a dinghy full of tourists.

Video footage captured the brave beast repeatedly jumping out of the water during the dramatic chase as concerned tourists cheered it on during the freedom dash.

Read more: https://www.thesun.co.uk/news/14271733/incredible-moment-penguin-escapes-a-pod-of-killer-whales-by-leaping-into-a-dinghy-full-of-tourists/

snippet.title: „Sind extrem stolz!“ | PK mit Edin Terzic | BVB – FC Sevilla 2:2
snippet.description:
Ein äußerst gut gelaunter Edin Terzic analysiert nach dem Weiterkommen ins Viertelfinale der UEFA Champions League das 2:2-Unentschieden im Rückspiel aus seiner Sicht. Wie er die strittigen Videoschiedsrichter-Entscheidungen von außen erlebt hat, wie stolz er auf seine Truppe ist und warum vorerst kein Gedanke ans Viertelfinale verschwendet wird, erfahrt ihr auf der Pressekonferenz.
▶ Abonnieren & die Glocke aktivieren: https://goo.gl/kujepC

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! - Power League, Trophy Road Brawler, and Seasonal Rewards!
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ►► https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ►► https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don’t let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team’s safe and try to crack open your opponents’. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you’re the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support — or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: Sophia & Toni: Heimliche AFFÄRE!? 🔥😲  | Köln 50667 #2067
snippet.description:
Für die Nonna spielen Sophia und Toni das perfekte Paar. Doch ist aus dem Fake Realität geworden? Jan jedenfalls findet ein sehr intimes Foto der beiden und ist sich sicher – Sophia betrügt ihn mit Toni!

Abonniert unseren Kanal: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCnrvUg5MJWPDSrv_voT7AqA?sub_confirmation=1
Holt euch die "Köln 50667"-App: https://k50.rtl2.de/0dNVt3CN29
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/koeln50667
Schaut euch die kompletten Folgen auf TVNOW an: http://www.tvnow.de/rtl2/koeln-50667
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/koeln50667
Twitter: http://twitter.com/rtl2

„Köln 50667“ ist eine Reality-Soap, die seit 2013 täglich von montags bis freitags im Vorabendprogramm gesendet wird. Aufgrund des großen Erfolges wurde die ursprünglich auf 120 Folgen begrenzte Serie weiter produziert und ist bisher auf über 2000 Folgen angewachsen. Im Mittelpunkt stehen unter anderem Kevin, Jan, Sophia, Marc und Jule. "Köln 50667" erzählt die spannenden Geschichten von Kevin, Sophia und Co. Egal, ob im Vanity oder in den WGs - hier gibt es Leben pur.

#köln50667 #k50 #rtlzwei

snippet.title: Ein ideales Rezept für Ihre Lieben, wenn Sie keine Zeit mehr haben | Cookrate - Deutschland
snippet.description:
Ein ideales Rezept für Ihre Lieben, wenn Sie keine Zeit mehr haben | Cookrate - Deutschland

Zutaten:
Teig - 250 g
Tomatensauce - 100 g
Oregano - 3 g
Käse - 100 g
Salami- 50 g
Schinken - 50 g
würzige Salami - 50 g

an der Oberfläche:
Tomatensauce - 30 g
Oregano - 3 g
Parmesan - 20 g

Im Ofen backen 30 min bei 180 ° C.
Backblechgröße 32 x 42 cm


Folge uns auf :
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Cookrat.Deutschland

snippet.title: This week on RELEASED | ROSÉ (Official Trailer)
snippet.description: Join ROSÉ this week on RELEASED as she tests how well her friends know her, see what artists are on her playlist, and performs solos with various instruments. All this leading up to the world premiere of her new music video “On The Ground”! Can't miss Music moments. RELEASED, every Thursday, only on YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

id.title: Pekan ini di RELEASED | ROSÉ (Trailer Resmi)
id.description: Bergabung dengan ROSÉ  pekan ini di RELEASED selagi dia menguji seberapa baik teman-temannya mengenalnya, melihat siapa artis yang ada di daftar putarnya, dan tampil solo dengan berbagai instrumen. Semua ini mengarah ke premier dunia video musik barunya “On The Ground”! Momen Musik yang tak bisa dilewatkan. RELEASED, tiap Kamis, hanya di YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ #OnTheGround

pt-BR.title: Esta semana no RELEASED | ROSÉ (Trailer Oficial)
pt-BR.description: Junte-se a ROSÉ esta semana no RELEASED, quando ela testa o quanto seus amigos a conhecem, revela quais artistas estão em sua playlist e toca solos com vários instrumentos. Tudo isto antes da estreia mundial de seu novo clipe, “On The Ground”! Momentos musicais imperdíveis. RELEASED, toda quinta, só no YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

th.title: สัปดาห์นี้ใน RELEASED | ROSÉ (ตัวอย่างทางการ)
th.description: พบกับ ROSÉ ในรายการ RELEASED สัปดาห์นี้เมื่อ ROSÉ ทดสอบว่าเพื่อนๆ รู้จักเธอดีแค่ไหน ศิลปินคนไหนที่เธอชอบฟัง และการแสดงเดี่ยวกับเครื่องดนตรีหลากหลาย ทั้งหมดนี้ก่อนรับชมการเปิดตัวมิวสิกวิดีโอเพลงใหม่ครั้งแรกในโลก เพลง “On The Ground” ของ ROSÉ ห้ามพลาดช่วง Music ใน RELEASED ทุกวันพฤหัสบดี เฉพาะทาง YouTube #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

vi.title: Tuần này trên RELEASED | ROSÉ (Trailer Chính thức)
vi.description: Trong tập RELEASED của tuần này, hãy cùng ROSÉ xem thử bạn bè cô ấy hiểu cô ấy tới đâu, những nghệ sĩ nào có mặt trong danh sách phát của cô ấy, và xem cô ấy biểu diễn độc tấu nhiều nhạc cụ. Tất cả là để chuẩn bị cho việc ra mắt video âm nhạc mới của cô ấy, "On The Ground", trên toàn cầu! Đừng bỏ lỡ khoảnh khắc âm nhạc. RELEASED, thứ Năm hàng tuần, chỉ có trên YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

ja.title: 今週の「RELEASED」| ROSÉ ロゼ（公式トレーラー）
ja.description: 今週の「RELEASED」ではROSÉが登場し、友人がどれだけ自分を理解しているかテストをしたり、彼女のプレイリストの中身や様々な楽器を使ったソロ演奏などを披露します。さらには、新曲“On The Ground”のミュージックビデオを初公開！お見逃しなく。「RELEASED」は毎週木曜日、YouTubeで独占配信。#RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

ko.title: RELEASED 이번 주 이야기 | ROSÉ (공식 예고편)
ko.description: 이번 주 RELEASED에서는 ROSÉ가 친구들이 ROSÉ를 얼마나 잘 아는지, 플레이리스트에 어떤 아티스트가 있는지를 테스트하고 다양한 악기로 솔로 공연을 합니다. 그리고 곧 공개될 그녀의 새 뮤직비디오 "On The Ground" 세계 첫 공개까지! 음악의 순간을 놓치지 마세요. 매주 목요일 오직 YouTube에서 RELEASED를 만나보세요. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

es-419.title: Esta semana en RELEASED | ROSÉ (Tráiler Oficial)
es-419.description: Únete a ROSÉ este semana en RELEASED, donde pondrá a prueba cuán bien la conocen sus amigos, descubre cuáles artistas están en su lista de reproducción, y mírala hacer solos con varios instrumentos. ¡Todo esto en anticipación al estreno mundial de su nuevo video musical “On The Ground”! Momentos imperdibles de la música. RELEASED, cada jueves, solo en YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

snippet.title: Bryson DeChambeau shot trails at 2021 Arnold Palmer Invitational
snippet.description:
Bryson DeChambeau once again led the field in strokes gained off-the-tee en route to his eighth victory on the PGA TOUR. Check out some of his best shot trails at Bay Hill Club & Lodge in the 2021 Arnold Palmer Invitational presented by Mastercard.

SUBSCRIBE to PGA TOUR now: http://pgat.us/vBxcZSh
 
Two-time FedExCup champion – and 2018 winner at Bay Hill – Rory McIlroy leads the star-studded field at the Arnold Palmer Invitational presented by Mastercard. Englishman Tyrrell Hatton returns to defend his title having won twice on the European Tour in the last five months and has rocketed up to fifth in the world since his Bay Hill victory in 2020. In-form Jordan Spieth is set to make his long-awaited Bay Hill debut, while three of the current top 10 players in this season’s FedExCup standings hope to continue their strong play, including Viktor Hovland, Harris English, and Max Homa. Other notables in the field include Justin Rose, Rickie Fowler, Bryson DeChambeau, and Patrick Reed. Ryder Cup captains Steve Stricker and Padraig Harrington received Sponsor’s Exemptions to compete, as did Kamaiu Johnson, who is set to play his second-ever PGA TOUR event.

Welcome to the official YouTube channel of the PGA TOUR.

Here you can find everything you need to stay up to date with the world’s foremost golf tour. Check in for highlights from every tournament plus player profiles, swing analysis and all the greatest shots and amazing moments. Teryn Gregson presents the craziest moments from around the world of golf in ‘Good, Bad & Unusual'.

Check out https://www.pgatour.com for complete coverage along with all the latest news, scoring, and stats!

Follow PGA TOUR online:
Instagram: https://instagram.com/pgatour/  
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PGATour  
Twitter: https://twitter.com/PGATOUR
SoundCloud: https://soundcloud.com/pgatour

Sign up for exclusive coverage - http://www.pgatourlive.com
PGA TOUR Superstore - http://www.pgatoursuperstore.com/

snippet.title: 50€ GESCHENKT? 🤨 Die Wahrheit über die YouTube-Codes bei Bibi & Julien Bam! (und bei uns)
snippet.description:
ABZOCKE in den Kommentaren?! Egal ob Bibi, Julien Bam oder bei uns - unter fast jedem YouTube-Video tauchen merkwürdige CODES auf. Wenn man diese Zahlenkombinationen sucht, landet man auf Websites mit großen Versprechen: KOSTENLOSE 50 €-Gutscheine! Wir haben uns das mal genauer angeschaut und sind dabei auf einen alten Bekannten gestoßen, ich sag nur: RINGDINGDING! 

Wir sind auch bei Instagram:
Robert: https://instagram.com/robertmitfilter​ 
Kim: https://instagram.com/kimsibimsi​ 
Raphael: https://instagram.com/TeamRaphRaff 

Wann habt ihr euch das letzte Mal einen Handyklingelton gekauft? Lange her, oder? Trotzdem werden jedes Jahr noch Abos für Handyklingeltöne abgeschlossen und einige von ihnen auf ziemlich fragwürdige Art und Weise.
Kim ist für euch ein bisschen durchs Internet getrampt und ist Kommentaren wie “Googelt mal ZV12hduB” oder “OMG! Wer nicht ZV12hduB googelt, verpasst was” gefolgt. Wenn man diese Codes *Überraschung* googelt, landet man auf dubiosen Internetseiten, die dir KOSTENLOSE GUTSCHEINE versprechen, mit denen du angeblich ordentlich SPAREN kannst. Wir haben mal gecheckt, was dahinter steckt. Bekommt man wirklich einen kostenlosen Gutschein? Wer ist am Ende der große Gewinner dieser Masche? Und was hat der Crazy Frog mit der ganzen Sache zu tun?
In diesem Video findet ihr Antworten auf all diese Fragen. Viel Spaß! 

Wir gehören zu funk: 
▶️ YouTube: https://youtube.com/funkofficial​ 
▶️ funk Web-App: https://go.funk.net​ 
▶️ Facebook: https://facebook.com/funk​ 
▶️ Impressum: https://go.funk.net/impressum
